body: Please review scripts/trinity_dan_cycle.py, ai_chi/tests/test_trinity_dan_cycle.py, _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/CYCLE_POLICY.md, and _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CODEX_TRINITY_CYCLE_LIVENESS_GATE_2026-06-14.md against CLAUDE_LIVENESS_CYCLE_RUNNER_GATE_CRITERIA_2026-06-14.md. Focus hard gates: no auto-run on ALIVE, executor allowlist unchanged, volume-only effect, conservative fallback on missing/unreadable/stale health summary, proposal-only preserved, no gated action triggered by liveness.
forbidden_actions: network listener or hidden service start
paid credit enablement or auto top-up
objective: Review cycle-runner liveness gate wiring against R8 criteria
summary: Codex wired scripts/trinity_dan_cycle.py to read health_summary.json as volume/format/timing input only. Missing/unreadable/stale summaries fall back compact queue-only; ALIVE does not authorize execution; executor allowlist remains sole authority boundary. 399 tests OK, floor True, raw_secret_scan pass.
